description: Celebrate love, diversity, and pride with our vibrant email template, perfect for events and seasonal promotions. Designed with a striking rainbow color palette, this template is an ideal choice for LGBTQ Pride Month celebrations or Valentine's Day promotions. In the spirit of unity and inclusivity, this template also acknowledges the challenges of covid-19, offering a positive and uplifting message. Whether you're organizing a pride parade, promoting a tech event, or spreading love for Valentine's Day, this template will help you share your message with style and pride. With its bold pink accents and universal theme of love, this template is a beautiful celebration of the LGBTQ community and the broader spirit of diversity.
short_description: Celebrate diversity with our vibrant email template, perfect for Pride Month, Valentine's Day, or tech events. Embrace the spirit of unity with this rainbow-themed template, acknowledging the challenges of covid-19 with positivity. Ideal for pride parades or spreading love, it beautifully celebrates the LGBTQ community.

designer.description: I’m an artisan user interface designer and front-end developer. I'm passionate about data visualization, user experience design and analytics interfaces. I enjoy solving complex problems that require a deep understanding of interface design, front-end development, and product management.

Important Message

we have made the difficult decision to cancel or postpone some events scheduled for June. Following increased and overwhelming concerns about the COVID-19 virus, we felt this was the best way to proceed during such an unprecedented global situation. We are very disappointed that we are unable to hold this event for our fans and supporters. But we know it’s the right decision based on the information we have today.

This situation won't stop us to celebrate with our love ones and we have decided to organise some of the event virtually please click the button below to learn more
